name: macrofx-terminal-plus
description: Institutional macro swing trading terminal — CMSI engine, live FX, backtest

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n VITE,ELECTRON -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:vite" "wait-on tcp:localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
